mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening demand for housing that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising HOUST are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or HOUST fails to exceed the 6-month moving average in > 30% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below the 12-month moving average signals a weakening supply chain that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with declining INDPRO are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or INDPRO fails to decline below the 12-month moving average in > 40% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in initial unemployment claims (UNRATE) above 0.5% signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with rising UNRATE are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or UNRATE fails to exceed 0.5% in > 25% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) below 2% signals a easing monetary cycle that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with declining FEDFUNDS are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or FEDFUNDS fails to decline below 2% in > 35% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in real GDP (GDPC1) above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening demand for goods and services that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods with rising GDPC1 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or GDPC1 fails to exceed the 6-month moving average in > 30% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below the 12-month moving average signals a weakening supply chain that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with declining INDPRO are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or INDPRO fails to decline below the 12-month moving average in > 40% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in initial unemployment claims (UNRATE) above 0.5% signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with rising UNRATE are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or UNRATE fails to exceed 0.5% in > 25% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) above the 6-month moving average and a 2-month increase in real GDP (GDPC1) above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening demand for housing and goods and services that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising HOUST and GDPC1 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or HOUST and GDPC1 fail to exceed the 6-month moving average in > 30% of instances.
